title: Safety Program/Risk Management: Emergency Medical Equipment and Procedures
description: Conroe ISD maintains emergency medical equipment, such as automated external defibrillators (AEDs), at district facilities and establishes procedures for responding to medical emergencies on campus. Staff members are trained to use this equipment and follow established protocols to provide immediate care until emergency services arrive. Knowing these procedures are in place helps parents and community members feel confident that the district is prepared to respond quickly if a medical emergency occurs during the school day or at a school event.
